mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, content_type, status, publish_status, author_id, author_name, category_id, cover_image, tags, view_count, like_count, comment_count, share_count, publish_time, scheduled_time, is_top, sort_order, source_type, source_url, version, allow_comment, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content ( title, summary, content, content_type, status, publish_status, author_id, author_name, category_id, cover_image, tags, view_count, like_count, comment_count, share_count, publish_time, scheduled_time, is_top, sort_order, source_type, source_url, version, allow_comment, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{contentType}, #{status}, #{publishStatus}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{categoryId}, #{coverImage}, #{tags}, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{publishTime}, #{scheduledTime}, #{isTop}, #{sortOrder}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceUrl}, 1, #{allowComment}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoKeywords}, #{seoDescription}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE content
title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, content_type = #{contentType}, status = #{status}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, category_id = #{categoryId}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, tags = #{tags}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, scheduled_time = #{scheduledTime}, is_top = #{isTop}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, version = version + 1, allow_comment = #{allowComment}, seo_title = #{seoTitle}, seo_keywords = #{seoKeywords}, seo_description = #{seoDescription}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE content SET deleted = 1, status = 4, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE content SET publish_status = #{publishStatus}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET like_count = like_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET comment_count = comment_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET share_count = share_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content WHERE status = 0 AND scheduled_time IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_time <= #{currentTime} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM content WHERE status = 0 AND scheduled_time <= #{now} AND scheduled_time IS NOT NULL AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM content WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY
publish_time DESC view_count DESC like_count DESC create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE content SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE content SET deleted = 1, status = 4, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
